# oidc-provider.dev
> Community documentation for panva/node-oidc-provider

This site documents oidc-provider, an OpenID Certified™ OAuth 2.0
Authorization Server implementation for Node.js.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://oidc-provider.dev/
- Quick Start: https://oidc-provider.dev/getting-started/quick-start/
- Accounts: https://oidc-provider.dev/getting-started/accounts/
- Mounting: https://oidc-provider.dev/getting-started/mounting/

## Guides
- User Flows: https://oidc-provider.dev/guides/user-flows/
- Custom Grant Types: https://oidc-provider.dev/guides/custom-grant-types/
- Context Access: https://oidc-provider.dev/guides/context-access/
- Middleware: https://oidc-provider.dev/guides/middleware/
- Proxy: https://oidc-provider.dev/guides/proxy/

## Configuration
- Adapter: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/adapter/
- Claims: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/claims/
- Clients: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/clients/
- Features Overview: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/features/
- Interactions: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/interactions/
- JWKS & JWA: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/jwks/
- PKCE: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/pkce/
- Tokens & TTL: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/tokens/
- Cookies: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/cookies/
- Other Options: https://oidc-provider.dev/configuration/misc/

## Reference
- Events: https://oidc-provider.dev/events/reference/
- API Reference: https://oidc-provider.dev/api/
- FAQ: https://oidc-provider.dev/faq/
- Changelog: https://oidc-provider.dev/changelog/
- Security Policy: https://oidc-provider.dev/security/

## Specifications Implemented
RFC 6749 (OAuth 2.0), OpenID Connect Core 1.0, OpenID Connect Discovery 1.0,
RFC 8414 (Authorization Server Metadata), RFC 7636 (PKCE), RFC 9449 (DPoP),
RFC 8705 (mTLS), RFC 7009 (Token Revocation), RFC 7662 (Token Introspection),
RFC 9701 (JWT Introspection Response), RFC 8628 (Device Authorization Grant),
CIBA, RFC 9126 (PAR), RFC 9101 (JAR), RFC 8707 (Resource Indicators),
FAPI 1.0, FAPI 2.0, JARM, Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591/7592),
RP-Initiated Logout, Back-Channel Logout, RFC 9207 (Issuer Identifier).

## Source
- Library: https://github.com/panva/node-oidc-provider
- Documentation site: https://github.com/Dahkenangnon/oidc-provider.dev
- RSS (Changelog): https://oidc-provider.dev/changelog-rss.xml
- v8.x docs: https://oidc-provider.dev/v8/
